exampleSentencesTranslated: The concert last night was really great, I liked it a lot.
I think this dish cooked like this is great.
I just got great news about your new job.

translation.en: The party last night was very wonderful.

notes:
tuyệt = great, awesome, excellent. It’s a strong positive word when you’re really impressed.

It’s an adjective, used to describe things, experiences, ideas, results, news, etc. It often comes after rất / quá / thật / cực kỳ to boost the feeling.

It can also stand alone as an excited reaction (like saying “Awesome!”).

Strong memory links: tuyệt vời (wonderful, even stronger), opposite: tệ (bad).

definitions.vi: Xuất sắc hoặc tuyệt vời; được sử dụng để thể hiện sự ngưỡng mộ.
definitions.en: Excellent or wonderful; used to express admiration.
definitions.es: Excelente o maravilloso; se usa para expresar admiración.

example.vi: Bữa tiệc hôm qua thật tuyệt.
example.es: La fiesta de ayer fue increíble.

exampleSentences: Buổi hòa nhạc tối qua thật sự rất tuyệt, em thích lắm.
Anh nghĩ món ăn này nấu như vậy là tuyệt rồi đó.
Chị vừa nhận được tin tuyệt về công việc mới của em.
notes_md:
**tuyệt** = great, awesome, excellent. It’s a strong positive word when you’re really impressed.

It’s an adjective, used to describe things, experiences, ideas, results, news, etc. It often comes after *rất / quá / thật / cực kỳ* to boost the feeling.

It can also stand alone as an excited reaction (like saying “Awesome!”).

Strong memory links: **tuyệt vời** (wonderful, even stronger), opposite: **tệ** (bad).

content.sentence: Buổi biểu diễn hôm nay thật ___.
